name: Injection molding Bridge; Building systems to USLCI
description:
This process links an input in a Building Systems process to a provider from the USLCI repository on the Federal LCA Commons. The intended providers for this process are "Polyethylene, linear low-density, LLDPE, virgin resin, at plant - RNA" and "Injection molding, rigid LLDPE part, at plant - RNA".

This bridge processes intends to model the injection of unspecified plastics. For that reason, the LLDPE in the injection molding input is removed as an input in the bridge process. Its treatment in the injection input is also is removed as an output as part of the bridge process and substituted for generic waste plastic. The input plastic should be specified outside of this process, and the original value multiplied by multiplied by 1.03, to account for the same losses that appear in the USCLI injection process process.

flow.name: Injection molding; at plant
